title: Refresh model registry and add cache-tier pricing
source: Anthropic docs: Models overview & Pricing — https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/about-claude/models ; Prompt caching pricing tiers
description: _MODEL_PRICING_USD_PER_1M (delegate.py:156-164) is stale and incomplete: it lists opus-4-7 but not the current Opus 4.8, has no cache_read/cache_write tiers, and any unknown model silently falls back to sonnet pricing — which will misreport cost once #1 lands. Prompt-cached input is billed at a reduced rate and cache writes at a premium; without those tiers the ledger can't reflect real savings.
proposed_changes: Add current model entries (e.g. claude-opus-4-8, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-haiku-4-5) and extend each entry with 'cache_read' and 'cache_write_5m' per-1M rates. Update CostTracker.estimate/record to bill cache_read_input_tokens at the cache_read rate and cache_creation_input_tokens at the cache_write rate. Replace the silent sonnet fallback with a logged warning so unknown model IDs are visible to Prometheus rather than mispriced.
